name.en: Cafés, bars & co-working spaces (not yet tagged)

description.en: Cafés, bars, pubs, fast food places, food courts, libraries, coworking spaces, community centres and bakeries that have not yet been tagged with laptop=*. Answer the question below to add them to the Laptop friendly places map.

question.en: Is working on a laptop welcome here?

questionHint.en: This is the only question that matters to get this place onto the laptop-friendly map. See taginfo: laptop for how this tag is used

then.en: Working on a laptop is welcome here
Working on a laptop is not allowed here
Working on a laptop is allowed, but with some restrictions

question.en: What are the restrictions on using a laptop here?

questionHint.en: Example: no @ (12:00-14:00) for "not allowed during lunch hours". See Conditional restrictions on the OSM wiki

question.en: Does this place offer internet access?

questionHint.en: Helps decide whether this is laptop-friendly. See Key:internet_access on the OSM wiki

then.en: Internet access is available via a terminal

question.en: Are power sockets available to charge devices?

questionHint.en: Example: plug sockets near tables or the bar. See Key:power_supply on the OSM wiki

then.en: Plenty of power sockets are available
